title: Software Update - Headset and all other components are up to date - UI
scenario: Verify Software Update tab displays "up to date" status with correct entries and firmware info for single headsets, headsets with charge stand, and earbuds with charge case.
steps: Check the displayed content for a single headset.
Verify there is one entry with a device image, device name, the message "Your Headset is Up To Date", and the current firmware version.
Check the displayed content for a headset with a charge stand.
Verify there are two entries (headset and stand), each with a device image, device name, the message "up to date", and the firmware version.
Check the displayed content for earbuds with a charge case.
Verify there are two entries (earbuds and case), each with a device image, device name, the message "up to date", and the firmware version.
expected: The Software Update tab displays \"up to date\" status for all connected components with the correct number of entries and details per device type.
